overview.short: Tringalwadi Fort is located in the Igatpuri taluka of Nashik district.
overview.description: Tringalwadi Fort is located in the Igatpuri taluka of Nashik district. It lies on an ancient trade route passing through the Thal Ghat, near the Tringalwadi village. The village also has an irrigation dam built in 1978.

topPlaces.name: Igatpuri
topPlaces.description: Igatpuri ([iɡət̪puɾiː]; formerly known as Egutpoora) is a town and a Hill Station.

topPlaces.name: Upper Vaitarna Dam
topPlaces.description: Upper Vaitarna Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on west flowing Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district of Maharashtra state in India. The reservoir created by this dam spreads on both Vaitarna and Godavari rivers catchment area.

topPlaces.name: Thal Ghat
topPlaces.description: Thal Ghat (also called as Thul Ghat or Kasara Ghat) is a ghat section (mountain incline or slope) in the Western Ghats near the town of Kasara in Maharashtra. The Thal Ghat is located on the busy Mumbai–Nashik route, and is one of the four major routes, rail and road routes, leading into Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Alwandi Dam
topPlaces.description: Alwandi Dam, is an earthfill dam on Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Igatpuri ([iɡət̪puɾiː]; formerly known as Egutpoora) is a town and a Hill Station.

Upper Vaitarna Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on west flowing Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district of Maharashtra state in India. The reservoir created by this dam spreads on both Vaitarna and Godavari rivers catchment area.

Thal Ghat (also called as Thul Ghat or Kasara Ghat) is a ghat section (mountain incline or slope) in the Western Ghats near the town of Kasara in Maharashtra. The Thal Ghat is located on the busy Mumbai–Nashik route, and is one of the four major routes, rail and road routes, leading into Mumbai.
Alwandi Dam, is an earthfill dam on Vaitarna river near Igatpuri, Nashik district in state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tringalwadi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tringalwadi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tringalwadi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tringalwadi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tringalwadi?
faq.a: Stays in Tringalwadi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tringalwadi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Igatpuri, Upper Vaitarna Dam, Thal Ghat, Alwandi Dam.
